title: Linear Regression Calculation
description: Compute linear regression line from data points
mermaid: graph TD A1[/'Start: Input Data'/] --> B1(/'Data Validation'/) style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 -- "Data OK?" --> C1{/'Sufficient Data Points?'/} style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1[/'Calculate Means: x̄ and ȳ'/] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 -- No --> X1[/'Error: Insufficient Data'/] style X1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff B1 -- "Data Invalid" --> Y1[/'Error: Data Validation Failed'/] style Y1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff D1 --> E1[/'Calculate Sum of Squares (SSxx)'/] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> F1[/'Calculate Sum of Products (SPxy)'/] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff F1 --> G1[/'Calculate Slope (b = SPxy / SSxx)'/] style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff G1 --> H1[/'Calculate Intercept (a = ȳ - b * x̄)'/] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> I1[/'Linear Regression Equation: y = a + bx'/] style I1 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff I1 --> J1[/'Calculate Predicted Values (ŷ)'/] style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1[/'Calculate Residuals (e = y - ŷ)'/] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> L1[/'Calculate Residual Sum of Squares (SSres)'/] style L1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff L1 --> M1[/'Calculate Total Sum of Squares (SStot)'/] style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 --> N1[/'Calculate R-squared (R² = 1 - SSres / SStot)'/] style N1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff N1 --> O1[/'Output: Slope (b), Intercept (a), R-squared (R²)'/] style O1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff O1 --> P1[/'End'/] style P1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
entities: /'Data Validation'/)style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 -- Data OK? --> C1{/'Sufficient Data Points?'/}style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1[/'Calculate Means: x̄ and ȳ'/
source_text: Source information to be added - please specify the book, paper, or reference material used by the LLM to generate this flowchart.
